headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen striker Patrik Schick bagged a hat-trick on Saturday to help the German champions battle back from a two-goal deficit and crush Heidenheim 5-2 in the Bundesliga.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen's Schick nets hat-trick in comeback win

video.headline: Patrik Schick heads home the goal to bag his hat trick for Leverkusen

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Patrik Schick heads home the goal to bag his hat trick for Leverkusen) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund eased past visiting Freiburg 4-0 in the Bundesliga on Saturday to make it six league wins from six home matches this season and move back up to fifth place.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund crush Freiburg, retain perfect home record

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Jamie Bynoe-Gittens scores in the 77') 2024/11/23 ESHEET

events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at VfL Wolfsburg
